partitions.selection_rule: Shuffle the frozen ranking-input gene_ids with seed 40 and assign the first 70 percent to train before any model fitting or label access.
partitions.leakage_rule: Train rows may only depend on pre-cutoff ranking inputs and must not expose held-out evaluation labels.

partitions.selection_rule: Continue the same deterministic shuffled gene_id order and assign the next 15 percent to validation.
partitions.leakage_rule: Validation rows may tune hyperparameters but must not see evaluation targets outside the validation partition.

partitions.selection_rule: Assign the remaining genes in the deterministic shuffled order to the held-out test partition.
partitions.leakage_rule: Test rows remain fully held out until scoring time and must never leak into feature construction or threshold selection.

description: Deterministic gene-level split manifest for the frozen NPC signature-reversal ranking dataset.
notes: The resulting split assignments are already embedded in the frozen ranking and evaluation CSVs as `split_name`.
